---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature for AURORA
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you are proposing.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Describe the current behavior and why it falls short.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you would like to see. If you have a design in mind, outline it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have evaluated and why they were ruled out.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, diagrams, links to related issues, or examples from other projects that could serve as inspiration.
